title: Minato Scraper Package
description: package.json schema for a Minato scraper

capabilities.description: Capabilities this scraper exposes. Declare only what you actually use.

items.description: 'ingest' — posting torrents (always required). 'status' — progress bar and phase visible in the dashboard. 'commands' — pause / stop / resume from the dashboard.

defaultConfig.description: Default configuration values. Users can override these from the Minato dashboard without touching your code. Keep values flat — strings, numbers, or booleans only.
